name: super-dev
description: Multi-stage development workflow: requirements, BDD, research, design, TDD implementation, code review, documentation, and merge — orchestrated via a hybrid declarative setup + dynamic pipeline controller.

stages.prompt: Bootstrap the development environment for the runtime task. Create a git worktree (unless input.skipWorktree is true), create a spec directory, and detect the project language/framework. Return control with worktreePath, specDirectory, defaultBranch, language, isWebUi, and specIdentifier.
